title: Unbelievably Optimised
description: A modpack aimed to increase FPS and the F3.
body:
### 📜 Changelog
- release - added main mods
### ❓ Purpose
unbelievably optimised is aimed towards improving the minecraft experience by increasing fps and making the games features look better.
### 🗣️ Main features
- Sodium
- BetterF3
- Entity Culling
- Iris shaders
